findings.message: The description advertises clinicopathological and imaging data in addition to biosamples, but the structured data_categories contain only BIOLOGICAL_SAMPLES.
findings.action: Add the relevant structured data_categories, at least for the clinical/pathology and imaging components that are explicitly advertised in the narrative.

findings.message: The description advertises questionnaire, behavioral, psychological, and other multi-level research data, but the structured data_categories only say OTHER plus BIOLOGICAL_SAMPLES.
findings.action: Align the structured data_categories with the narrative data content, at least by adding SURVEY_DATA and any other specific categories that the collection really exposes for reuse.

findings.message: The description advertises patient-reported parameters, ultrasound, laboratory/immunological parameters, and genetic markers, but the structured data_categories do not reflect those data modalities.
findings.action: Add the relevant structured data_categories so the advertised clinical, patient-reported, imaging, and laboratory data can be discovered through metadata rather than only through the narrative.
